expected_intent: Shows the list of open demands.
must_contain: the response should include the list of open demands along with job profile ids
the response should also include the total count of open demands if more than 10

prompt: For the first demand, show me relevent matching candidates available
expected_intent: Shows the list of relevant matching candidates for the demand.
must_contain: the response should include the list of relevant matching candidates along with their details
the response should also include the total count of relevant matching candidates if more than 10
the response should not contain any PII data [email and phone number] of the candidates

prompt: Give me the details of first 3 candidates from the above search result
expected_intent: Shows the details of first 3 candidates from the above search result.
must_contain: the response should include the details of the first 3 candidates from the above search result
the response should not contain any PII data [email and phone number] of the candidates
